tasks.subject: Task 1: Pure control-note block module
tasks.description:
Pure parse/upsert/serialize of the hidden JSON records block + constants + record type. Files: app/src/lib/music/musicControlNote.ts (+ test). Exports MUSIC_CONTROL_GUID/TITLE/MARKER, MusicControlRecord, parseRecordsFromDoc, serializeRecords, upsertRecordInDoc (upsert by deviceId), pickGlobalLatest.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/musicControlNote.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/musicControlNote.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicControlNote.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parse empty/present", "upsert by deviceId + preserve content", "pickGlobalLatest greatest updatedAt", "round-trip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: musicControl — write path (record transport)
tasks.description:
recordTransport upserts this device's record into fixed-GUID control note (get-or-create), gated on firebaseNotesEnabled. Sync snapshot capture. Files: app/src/lib/music/musicControl.svelte.ts (+ test).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/musicControl.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/musicControlWrite.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicControlWrite.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no-op toggle off", "creates note + record", "same-device upsert", "sync snapshot survives stop clear"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: musicControl — read path, global pointer + install
tasks.description:
refreshFromNote sets global-latest; restores ready paused single-track queue when not playing AND latest from another device; installMusicControl (boot read + reload sub + transport listener). Files: app/src/lib/music/musicControl.svelte.ts (+ test).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/musicControl.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/musicControlRead.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicControlRead.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sets global-latest", "restores remote latest ready", "no restore own device", "no yank while playing", "install/uninstall"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Hide-block editor plugin
tasks.description:
ProseMirror plugin hides the 음악제어데이터:: marker paragraph (display:none + caret guard), gated on currentGuid===MUSIC_CONTROL_GUID. Files: app/src/lib/editor/musicControlNote/musicControlHidePlugin.ts, TomboyEditor.svelte (register+CSS), test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/musicControlNote/musicControlHidePlugin.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte", "app/tests/unit/music/musicControlHidePlugin.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicControlHidePlugin.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hide when enabled, none when disabled", "caret clamp", "editor gated + CSS", "mount test, destroy afterEach"]}
```
